desk.name: desk
desk.notes: Annotated red desk/table area. Navigation target is placed south of the table, not inside the table rectangle.

front_door.name: front_door
front_door.notes: Annotated red front door area. Navigation target is set back inside the room to keep camera distance from the door.

window.name: window
window.notes: Annotated red window area. Navigation target is offset inward from the right wall.
